project_scope: lattice-based anonymous authentication backend; not a general-purpose anonymous credential system
not_yet_machine_checked: full SHA-256 compression gadget mapped into LaZer constraints
native preimage-to-digest constraints inside proof generation
complete UC theorem with simulator and composition proof
paper_safe_claim: v2.4 splices output limbs of multiple selected SHA-256 digest relations into the generated LaZer proof path. It is a larger native-splice prototype that checks digest limb binding natively while SHA-256 compression/preimage correctness remains in the fullrelation checker/IR path.
lazer_proved_current: multi-native digest output-bit splice: refresh_tag, nullifier, credential_commitment, credential_tag, delta_commitment, ctx_digest, public_response_digest, and repair_digest head/tail limbs are bound by LaZer rows 6..21
sha256_circuit_checked: v2.4 native output-bit splice uses compiler plans for all selected digest relations
